steps.title: Translate 10% as a fraction
steps.content: We're told 10% of the marbles are red. Since 10% equals $\frac{1}{10}$, finding 10% of 320 is the same as dividing 320 by 10.

steps.title: Calculate the number of red marbles
steps.content:
$$\frac{320}{10} = 32$$
This represents the red-marble group only; the remaining marbles are other colors and are not part of the requested count. That confirms A is correct.
